tasks.label: Zeus: Verify all
tasks.command: node --check app.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/_worker.js && node tests/agent_engine.test.mjs && python3 -m pytest tests/test_mt5_bridge.py -q

tasks.label: Zeus: Sync public frontend
tasks.command: cp index.html public/index.html && cp styles.css public/styles.css && cp app.js public/app.js

tasks.label: Zeus: Deploy Cloudflare
tasks.command: npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name zeustrading-online --commit-dirty=true
